nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli neighborhood of Naples, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes.
Camorra clan led by the Di Biasi family, rivals of the Russo clan in the Quartieri Spagnoli.
Camorra clan operating in Soccavo, Naples; one member of the Russo clan is affiliated with them.
Related Camorra clan from the Rione Traiano area of Naples, allied with the Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Related Camorra clan from Fuorigrotta, Naples, allied with the Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Camorra clan allied with Ciro Lepre, who is allied with the Russo clan.

edges.context: The Russo clan and the Faiano clan were engaged in a violent feud from 1999 onwards, resulting in multiple deaths on both sides.
A member of the Russo clan is affiliated with the Puccinelli clan of Soccavo.
The Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli is related by blood to the Russo clan of Rione Traiano.
The Russo clan of Quartieri Spagnoli is related by blood to the Russo clan of Fuorigrotta.
Ciro Lepre, allied with Misso, is related by marriage to the Russo clan.
